name: ai-furniture-hub
description: Furniture, home appliances, gadgets & smart home product data with mm-precision dimensions, related-item chains, and Rakuten/Amazon affiliate links. 31 categories, 80+ brands, 13 tools.
long_description:
MCP server that provides structured product data for furniture, home appliances, PC peripherals, smart home devices, beauty devices, kitchen gadgets, and health/fitness equipment.

Key features:
- **mm-precision search**: All dimensions in millimeters for exact space-fit calculations
- **Related-item chains**: Every product links to required accessories, protection materials, and add-ons
- **Shelf + storage coordination**: Auto-calculate how many boxes fit per shelf tier
- **Space-fit suggestions**: Give dimensions, get everything that fits
- **Rakuten Ichiba API**: Real-time product search (requires API key)
- **Amazon affiliate links**: Search URL generation with category-specific SearchIndex
- **31 categories**: From furniture to smart home to beauty devices
- **80+ brands**: Nitori, IKEA, Muji, Dyson, Panasonic, Sony, and more

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search curated product catalog by dimensions (mm), price, color, category

tools.name: get_product_detail
tools.description: Full specs by product ID with related-item hints

tools.name: search_rakuten_products
tools.description: Rakuten Ichiba product search with affiliate URLs

tools.name: coordinate_storage
tools.description: Shelf + storage box set proposals with quantity calculations

tools.name: suggest_by_space
tools.description: Space dimensions to fitting products, grouped by category

tools.name: identify_product
tools.description: Photo features to model number, specs, related items

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: Browse all 31 product categories with counts

tools.name: get_popular_products
tools.description: Popular products by category or brand

tools.name: get_related_items
tools.description: Related-item chain: accessories, protection, consumables, add-ons

rakuten_app_id.title: Rakuten API Application ID
rakuten_app_id.description: Optional: enables real-time Rakuten Ichiba product search. Get one at https://webservice.rakuten.co.jp/

rakuten_access_key.title: Rakuten API Access Key
rakuten_access_key.description: Optional: required together with Rakuten App ID

affiliate_id_rakuten.title: Rakuten Affiliate ID
affiliate_id_rakuten.description: Optional: your Rakuten affiliate ID for earning commissions (e.g. 12345678.abcdef01.12345678.abcdef02)

affiliate_id_amazon.title: Amazon Associate Tag
affiliate_id_amazon.description: Optional: your Amazon Associate tag for affiliate links (e.g. your-tag-22)
